prompt:
Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! And it's interesting for me to know, what do you think about it?

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! And it's interesting for me to know, what do you think about it?
TEXT_TYPE: essay

Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, I have some tips that can help you to solve your difficulties in studing in university.

I want to start with one important thought: it`s okay to have some difficulties in the beggining of your studing. Everything around is new and you will need a time to feel free here. 

So the first thing I can recommend is making friends. It will take some time from you, but it`s worth it. Friends will help you with studying and it is more interesting to get fun together. To have a rest is also a very important part of studing, don`t forget about it.

The second thing is time manegement. Often university has many subjects to study, a lot of home tasks and plenty of other interesting activities. If you don`t want to know absolutely everything about every subject, I`ll recommend you to refuse from going on some lecturies and activities. But you need to be accurate with it. It`s easy to start getting bad marks, so you need to decide what lecturies you will be visiting and what tasks will be doind.

I hope me suggestions will help you, good luck and good bye.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"in studing","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":66,"end":76},{"text":"in university.","labels":["Grammar"],"start":77,"end":91},{"text":"in the beggining","labels":["Grammar","Lexical choice"],"start":173,"end":189},{"text":"studing","labels":["Spelling"],"start":198,"end":205},{"text":"around","labels":["Grammar"],"start":218,"end":224},{"text":" new and ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":227,"end":236},{"text":"need a time","labels":["Grammar"],"start":245,"end":256},{"text":"take some time from you","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":340,"end":363},{"text":"studying and ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":411,"end":424},{"text":"studing","labels":["Spelling"],"start":516,"end":523},{"text":"manegement","labels":["Spelling"],"start":574,"end":584},{"text":"university","labels":["Grammar"],"start":592,"end":602},{"text":"home tasks","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":640,"end":650},{"text":"I`ll recommend you to refuse","labels":["Grammar"],"start":764,"end":792},{"text":"refuse from going","labels":["Grammar"],"start":786,"end":803},{"text":"going on some lecturies","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":798,"end":821},{"text":"lecturies","labels":["Spelling"],"start":812,"end":821},{"text":"accurate","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":857,"end":865},{"text":"lecturies","labels":["Spelling"],"start":940,"end":949},{"text":"doind","labels":["Spelling"],"start":994,"end":999},{"text":"me","labels":["Grammar"],"start":1009,"end":1011}],"strengths":[{"text":"The second thing","labels":["Sentence structure ✓"],"start":549,"end":565}],"comments":[]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07001","cefr_level":"A2","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, i had a simular problem. Here is the tips that helped me.
1) Manage your time! Use special apps and calendars. You can find this apps at Play Market.

2) Don't spend a lot of time to TV and social media. You should leave from useless groups at VK, don't watch YouTube a lot!

3) Sleep more than 8 hours and eat good food. It will bring you enought energy.

I hope, my tips will help you.
